channel.title: Posts on Anil Turaga's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Anil Turaga's Blog

item.title: Search Engine's Blind Spot: Continuity and Context
item.description: Nearly 35 years has passed from the advent of search engines. Google search experience has been relatively stagnant for a long time barring changes in speed of the results and the recent AI Overviews. Search offerings can be broadly bifurcated into two types: Wall of blue links Chat interface that reads sites for you Personal preference: I would rather be presented with a list of curated excerpts from different sites based on my query.
